name: Open a PR from the list and load its review detail
description: From the seeded repo's PR list, confirm the COST column renders the PR's aggregate run cost ($0.012 from the seeded Security Reviewer run), then click into PR #482 and confirm the detail route loads with the PR title and review surface. Exercises nested routing (/repos/<id>/pulls/<number>) and the per-PR detail fetch. Assumes a freshly-seeded DB where the demo repo acme/payments-api (PR #482) is the first repo — guaranteed by the e2e-web.yml workflow's fresh seed; run locally against a clean DB (see e2e/README.md).

cmd: Add rate limiting to public API endpoints
steps.label: seeded PR title row is visible
the COST column header is visible
the seeded PR's aggregate run cost renders

cmd: Add rate limiting to public API endpoints
steps.label: open the PR row
navigate to the PR detail route

cmd: Add rate limiting to public API endpoints
steps.label: PR title renders on the detail page
